titleStmt.title: Kankai(do) shi — Poem on Viewing the Sea, Zheng Daozhao (rubbing)
鄭道昭・観海童詩（拓本）

msIdentifier.repository: Japan Search (ジャパンサーチ) — national aggregator

msContents.summary: Ink rubbing of a Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 (Tei Dōshō) Daoist cliff inscription: Kankai(do) shi — Poem on Viewing the Sea, Zheng Daozhao. Holding institution: Daito Bunka University (libdaito / i-repository.net). This is the 觀海島詩 named in the brief. Image verified HTTP 200 image/jpeg. Record landing page 301-redirects (canonicalisation).

support.objectType: 拓片 · ink rubbing on paper

origin.origDate: Northern Wei, undated (北魏・無紀年)

bibl.ref: Japan Search (ジャパンサーチ) — national aggregator — record

revisionDesc.change: Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 (Tei Dōshō) Daoist cliff inscription; harvested from Japan Search (ジャパンサーチ) — national aggregator via the Epiwen Japanese-repository workflow. Image served live.

div.p: Ink rubbing — see the linked record/manifest.
